# Suggested GitHub Labels

## Status

- `status:todo`
- `status:in-progress`
- `status:done`
- `status:parked`
- `status:check`

## Priority

- `priority:p0`
- `priority:p1`
- `priority:p2`

## Area

- `area:main-text`
- `area:figures`
- `area:supplement`
- `area:methods`
- `area:experiment`
- `area:results-ordered`
- `area:results-pbi2`
- `area:software`
- `area:repo-organization`

## Example issue titles

```text
[P0][figures] Create Bi2Se3 Qz projection overlays with data/model curves
[P0][figures] Create Bi2Te3 detector image with Q/Qr/Qz trajectories
[P0][text] Draft two-component mosaicity / Lorentzian-tail evidence paragraph
[P0][text] Add Q-space projection caveat paragraph
[P1][experiment] Add incident-angle table for Bi2Se3 and Bi2Te3
[P1][supplement] Write 2theta-phi/caked-space implementation section
[P1][supplement] Write Monte Carlo beam and mosaic sampling section
[P2][results-pbi2] Revisit PbI2 selected-rod disorder figure
[P2][software] Defer software release cleanup until ordered figures are complete
```

## Suggested project columns

- Backlog
- Next meeting
- In progress
- Advisor check
- Done
- Parked
